trials.supervisor_analysis: Baseline stage complete. Score 63.10 achieved with 1.31x speedup (4.05ms -> 3.08ms). Profiling shows conv at 85.5% and fused elementwise at 14.5%. Advancing to optimization stage 2.

nudges.text: The mysterious `aten::add_` taking ~10% of GPU time is likely the conv2d bias addition — `nn.Conv2d` with `bias=True` (default) launches a separate kernel to add the bias after the convolution. You can eliminate this by setting `self.conv = nn.Conv2d(..., bias=False)` and folding `self.conv.bias` into your Triton kernel (add it before or after the model bias, adjusting accordingly). This should save ~0.4ms.
